note: OP.GG currently returns typed text for selected counter fields.

content.text:
class LolGetChampionAnalysis: data
class Data: weak_counters,strong_counters
class WeakCounter: champion_id,champion_name,play,win,win_rate

LolGetChampionAnalysis(Data([WeakCounter(55,"Katarina",7128,3452,0.52),WeakCounter(1,"Annie",4458,2148,0.52),WeakCounter(91,"Talon",2348,1129,0.52)],[WeakCounter(268,"Azir",1636,954,0.58),WeakCounter(777,"Yone",4768,2599,0.55),WeakCounter(80,"Pantheon",599,327,0.55)]))
